results.title: Velo: AI video infrastructure to explain, train, and sell faster
results.content:
So we went back and started reworking how we think about voice cloning at Velo. Not just matching how you sound, but capturing how you express. The way your voice changes when you re explaining something, when you re just talking casually, or when you actually care about what you re saying.  
That s what we re building now. The next version of Velo is focused on higher fidelity voice cloning. More nuance. Better pacing. More natural expression.  
Something that doesn t feel like a generated voice reading your script, but closer to you actually speaking.  
We re still building it, but it s coming together fast. We re planning to ship this soon.  
If you ve used Velo before, we d love to know - what do you think about Velo's voice cloning or other workflows? What would make it feel right? [...] Subscribe

## FAQs

Try for Free

### 

Velo is an AI video platform - video infrastructure for work. It turns company context, source artifacts, and workflow intent into clear videos for demos, support, onboarding, training, and sales.

### 

A video editor helps you change a video after it exists. Velo helps create, update, translate, host, and distribute video from company knowledge. It is a system, not just an editing surface.

### 

You can create product demos, support explainers, customer onboarding videos, employee training, SOPs, compliance videos, changelog videos, release note videos, and agent-generated videos.

results.title: About Velo | AI-Powered Video Messaging Platform
results.content:
## What drives us

Vibe coding made everyone a developer. We believe the same shift is coming for communication. The people who build, sell, support, and teach shouldn’t need production skills to share what they know. They should just be able to show it.

That’s what we’re building toward.

## The team

Two founders who found the idea. Six people believed in it enough to join in two months. 4 engineers, a designer, a growth marketer and a generalist - all building a better way to communicate or show.

### You've got something worth showing, just VELO it!

## Our team

Sourav Sanyal

### Sourav Sanyal

Founder & CEO

Ajay Kumar

### Ajay Kumar

Founder & CTO

Sundeep Joshi 

### Sundeep Joshi

Staff ML Engineer

Ronak Shah 

### Ronak Shah

Product Designer

Sunil Sharma [...] Then Sourav got introduced to a large vibe coding company. Instead of asking “what are your biggest problems?” he asked a simpler question: “What’s on your next sprint?”

He just listened. The guy went through feature after feature until he said something that stopped the conversation:

People love vibe coding but explaining the process is a mess. We want something like vibe demoing - you push a toggle and create a video message without recording a camera or screen.

That’s where Velo came from, one person telling us exactly what they needed. And within days, we had a $25K contract to kick things off.

## What drives us [...] ### Ronak Shah

Product Designer

Sunil Sharma 

### Sunil Sharma

Full-Stack Dev

Grege Rodrigues

We'd love your support on PH, go try it:  Pitches, tutorials, product reviews, demos, task updates, ideas - anything you want to share across, make it worth watching with Velo. Here's how it works: → Record your screen without needing to perform → Velo's AI clears your audio, syncs your visuals, and delivers an awesome video. In minutes. One take and you're done. → Add auto-zooms, background music, and an AI avatar that looks and sounds like you or pick one of our public avatars. One click. → OR you can paste a URL or a file (PPT, PDF, PNG), and let our browser agent make a Velo for you. This is the fastest way to [...] a sneak peek of what our output actually looks like. I wanted to put together a literature review by Sundeep Joshi of the latest Diffusion Transformers and talking-head systems (Halo, EMO, EchoMimic, etc.). Normally, recording, editing, and syncing a presentation like this would take hours. With Velo, the generation process was nearly 1:1 with the video length. It started as a rough screen recording. What you're seeing is what Velo turned it into. We are so ready to hand it over to our early access users. If you create presentations, tutorials, or content of any kind DM me, we can help you save hours and $$$. results.title: Velo (nicotine pouches)
results.content: Velo is a brand of nicotine pouches produced by British American Tobacco (BAT). It was introduced as part of the company’s move toward “modern oral” nicotine products marketed as smokeless alternatives to cigarettes and snus. The brand replaced BAT’s earlier pouch product Lyft in a rebranding campaign and has since been distributed across multiple markets, including the United States, the United Kingdom, Mexico and Kenya. Velo products contain nicotine derived from tobacco but no tobacco leaf or plant material, and are designed to be placed between the gum and lip for absorption.
